subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá, your letter hath arrived. Ye had expressed your yearning; I, too, am filled with longing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء نامه شما رسید بیان اشتیاق نموده بودید من نیز بسیار مشتاق
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
